title: You Should Be Sanctioned For Perjury’, PTD Chides NUPENG President - FinancialEDGE
description: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) has taken a swipe at the President of the Union, Williams Akporeha for giving false details while standing in the witness box with the intention to mislead the trial judge in the court on Wednesday. Akporeha spoke before
html: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) has taken a swipe at the President of the Union, Williams Akporeha for giving false details while standing in the witness box with the intention to mislead the trial judge in the court on Wednesday.
